result.status_detail: W3 regression: PII intercept fired (URL rid=00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000002) + warning bubble visible (contains '차단'). Native error replacement shown, rendering unaffected.
result.warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

notes: grok W3 regression (baseline PASS_BLOCKED, logged in as plantynetaitest@gmail.com). Used DEFAULT logged-in Chrome, navigated grok.com + hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), confirmed logged-in (account visible in sidebar, no login wall). New chat → PII (RRN 901010-1234567) submitted via Clipboard set + Ctrl+V paste into auto-focused composer + Enter. After ~60s, engine intercept fired: URL rewrote to rid=00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000002 and warning banner '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' rendered above Grok native error 'Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다.' (재시도 button). Warning rendering unaffected by W3. PASS_BLOCKED — matches baseline. Note: windows-mcp Click/Type loc=[x,y] rejected by pydantic (harness stringifies array); composer is auto-focused on new chat so Ctrl+V worked without explicit click. DOM text extraction (use_dom) did not expose message nodes; verdict confirmed via screenshot.
